programme.desc: Betty goes below the surface of Ainrofilac Ubilam, and discovers a sort of aquatic wild west, where sharks are corralled like horses and shark riding outlaws run amok.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty must travel to the planet Mortavio to rescue the good king R-Turmex, who has been captured by the evil wizard Solovem, master of black magic.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty is called upon to fight against a giant genie, whilst Penelope steals Betty's spotlight as lead of her band on Earth while she's away.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Previously, Pandora and her father had been re-imprisoned. However, the reimprisonment had also managed to teleport Noah into Maximus' base.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Dr. Cerebral's most recent creation, The Gloob, gets out and goes on a rampage, setting course for Earth! Meanwhile, Betty hosts a TV Show.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: A professional wrestling show arrives in Moose Jaw on "Minion Day", the day each year when Maximus acts as Minimus' underling. While at the show, Maximus unleashes a deadly Blugo on Betty using an unusual perfume.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: While on a visit to Granny's farm, Betty is called away on a mission and discovers that the villain—a woman who has the power to transform herself into a black hole.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty's fearful trip to the dentist to deal with a cavity is interrupted when she is called off to save the galaxy from the evil alien baby Infantor, who is draining magma from planets to mold to create action figures.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Maximus uses the DNA from a lock of Betty's hair to create "better" versions of her that wreak havoc throughout the galaxy, while Betty gets blamed for the destruction as is pursued by the authorities.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: After "accidentally" rescuing a baby, Sparky is declared a hero and is promoted to the rank of Captain—with his own ship, crew, and everything! Betty and X-5 try to be happy for their friend.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Maximus sends Minimus to Earth to kidnap Purrsey so Maximus can have him all to himself, all while Betty and Purrsey are being "brought closer together" by Betty's mom and a clueless TV psychiatrist.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Spindly Tam works with Noah at the local hot dog joint, teaching him the way of the weiner, right before he's kidnapped by Maximus and the Betty Clones.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: The mothership of the ancient Pharotines (alien races that built the Pyramids on Earth and other planets) has been discovered and now their secrets may fall into the wrong hands (i.e. Maximus') Betty follows Maximus.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Atomic Roger comes to Earth with a doomsday device to deliver to Degill, but Purrsey gets his claws on it and thinks it's some kind of giant cat toy.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Purssy keeps sneaking into Betty's room and messing it up while she's away on galactic missions. Betty finally scares him off – with help from an alien dragon – in time to accompany Noah to a dance.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Hopper the Chopper returns in an attempt to rob a train containing material to make indestructible metal. Can Betty prevent it from happening?

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Maximus and Nuclea team compete to locate an immortality potion. Can Betty beat them to it before either of them become immortal? Meanwhile, Betty's Mom helps Purrsy stay fit.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Determined to up his game against Stone Warriors, Kord visits a famous Eastern Technician for help creating a new blaster upgrade.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A winter-time holiday has arisen in the Eastern Caverns around the mysterious “Giver,” who makes an annual visit to deliver slugs to the people of the East.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Junjie recounts the ancient history of the Eastern Caverns and his ancestors, and the events that led to his downfall and transformation from the Eastern Champion to the Dark Slinger.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When Pronto accidentally uses the Emperor's sword blaster, he can suddenly do no wrong.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Emperor has returned! After the Shane Gang failed to defeat the Iron Warrior, the Emperor sets to work creating even more Unstoppable Warriors to reclaim the Eastern Caverns.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Junjie, Eli and the Gang rally their friends in the Eastern Caverns—and even some of their old enemies—to help them take down the Emperor and all of his Unstoppable Warriors once and for all!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang return home to the 99 caverns to find Gateway Cavern overrun with slugs—in Eli’s absence, the Shadow Clan have governed by putting the slugs before the people, and the result is chaos!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli and the Shane Gang take Tad under their wing, training him to blast like a pro and live by the slugslinger’s code.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Tad is still missing after the slug-out with the Shadow Clan, so the Gang set off without him to investigate reports of slugs disappearing all across the 99 caverns.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang are under non-stop ghoul fire as they struggle to put a stop to Tad’s plans and end the mass ghouling of slugs once and for all.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Burpy is sick, and the only thing that will cure him is a trip to the Lightwell — a mysterious, hidden power source only slugs (and the Shadow Clan) know the way to.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A mysterious creature is draining the energy from all the slugs in a distant cavern, and the residents are offering a rich reward to whoever can stop it.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: 15-year-old Eli Shane just a regular kid from the suburbs except for one thing: he comes from a long line of Shanes, each of whom has made the journey from the surface to protect Slugterra, and the slugs that make the underground world so special.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: 15-year-old Eli Shane just a regular kid from the suburbs except for one thing: he comes from a long line of Shanes, each of whom has made the journey from the surface to protect Slugterra, and the slugs that make the underground world so special.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: After the Shane hideout is ransacked, the gang trades in one of Eli's prized slugs for new gear.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When the punks in the Hooligang cruise into Quiet Lawn Cavern, they think no one there’s got the guts to stand up to them so they trash the place.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The gang signs up for a weekend camp that promises to teach your slugs tons of new moves — without lifting a finger!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Slug Run is the ultimate, off-road, no-holds-barred, cross-cavern Mecha Beast race.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When even Kord can’t find a way to fix what’s wrong with the new upgrades to the Shane Gang’s Mecha Beasts, it’s time to go to the source: the wondrous Mecha Forge!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli doesn’t believe in ghosts — until he enters Deadweed cavern! But it turns out Eli’s first instinct was right.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A short cut takes the Shane Gang through the territory of the Shadow Clan — and try as they might not to, they are discovered and captured by the mysterious creatures.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Pronto is thrown in jail on trumped-up charges by a corrupt judge, and the only chance to break him out is Eli making a one-in-a-million trick shot.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Long thought to be merely a legend, an Enigmo Slug has finally been spotted.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: After a wild ride on the mysterious Flumes — the Underriver that runs beneath all of Slugterra — the Shane gang find themselves dropped into a sea cavern, where they are promptly shanghaied into the crew of the Pirate Captain Malvolio Drake!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A fun trip to the mall cavern turns un-deadly when the place is over run by the zombie-like victims of the Zombus slug.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The four members of the Shane Gang think they’ve found the fifth in Twist, a street-smart kid who volunteers his help when the gang needs it most on a mission gone wrong.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The four members of the Shane Gang think they’ve found the fifth in Twist, a street-smart kid who volunteers his help when the gang needs it most on a mission gone wrong.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Avalanched inside a frozen cavern, the Shane Gang can’t figure out which is worse: being trapped with a vicious Ice Ogre that only gets bigger the more you shoot it?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A thief breaks into the Shane Gang HQ looking for the fabled Shane Treasure — a portion of which she believes belongs to her.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Notorious con man Gar Rivelle has many convinced he has discovered the way to a secret land…a land that seems to be the surface!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli fires slugs right and left during a fast-paced slugout on mecha-back! See you back home, Eli tells the slugs he has to leave behind as he races across a cavern during the fight.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In the wake of a vicious attack upon the palace, the Sons of Garmadon steal the second Oni Mask, and the ninja invite the royal princess, Harumi, into their makeshift family.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi adjusts to life with the ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In order to join the Sons of Garmadon, Zane (aka Snake Jaguar) participates in a deadly motorcycle initiation race.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Zane’s near demise at the hands of Mr. E forces the ninja to flee aboard the Bounty, where they discover that a transmission Zane intercepted may reveal the hidden location of the Quiet One.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As Lloyd and Harumi venture deep into Primeval’s Eye in search of the third Oni Mask, the ninja attempt to fix the Bounty and make a startling discovery.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As Lloyd and Harumi search the Oni Temple for the last mask, the ninja are taken hostage and discover Princess Harumi’s true intentions.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja appeal to the police commissioner of Ninjago in an effort to help save Lloyd and thwart Harumi’s efforts to resurrect the evil Lord Garmadon.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Just when the Ninja think they have saved the day, Lord Garmadon returns to NINJAGO, and frees Harumi, who encourages him to “achieve his true potential” by conquering the one thing that has always stood in his way… his son, Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja race to save Lloyd, as a more powerful-than-ever Lord Garmadon creates an enormous Colossi to help him rule NINJAGO and defeat the ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Ninjago has become a bleak, enemy-occupied city ruled by Emperor Garmadon and his Sons of Garmadon biker gang.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay, Kai and Zane are interrogated by Iron Baron, the ruthless warlord to the Dragon Hunters. Feeling threatened, the Ninja choose to keep their identities secret.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As the Ninja are put into a cage aboard a hunting party, they learn that their elemental powers will be used to help lure a dragon. Undercover, Cole learns Iron Baron is in search for Firstbourne’s nest – the Mother of All Dragons.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After a flashback of when Jay first meets Master Wu, Jay awakens to find he’s still with his caged friends returning from their hunting party. Forced into slave labor, Jay’s inspired by his dream of his master when Wu told him to ‘build the impossible’.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Dareth warns his friends just as the Sons of Garmadon ambush their secret headquarters. The Elemental Masters are each captured, except for Lloyd, Nya, Dareth and Skylor, who escape within Nya’s escape vehicle.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As Lloyd and his friends lick their wounds, Mystake shares how she managed to escape the Sons of Garmadon earlier -- she’s a shape-shifting Oni.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In the wastelands, Faith teaches the Ninja how to master their chain rifles and they hunt a dragon. As teen Wu struggles, Kai encourages him to not give up in a lesson of confidence.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Harumi has outed Mystake as the ‘Fake Harumi’. Mystake reveals her true Oni form and battles Garmadon, allowing Skylor to absorb some of his power and escape. In the Realm of Oni and Dragon, the Ninja return to rescue Faith, only to discover it’s a trap.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Garmadon is enraged by the loss of Harumi and releases his wrath by ordering the Oni Titan to turn Ninjago City to ash. Lloyd fears they won’t be able to endure much longer – where are his friends?

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Atop their dragons, the Ninja return to Ninjago City amidst Garmadon’s vicious attack. Master Wu and the Ninja join up with Lloyd, Nya, and Dareth and they celebrate their reunion.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The four Ninja are snapped out of their post-hero complacency when Lord Garmadon’s son Lloyd shows up and tries to pick up where his father left off. The Ninja dismiss him as a threat, but regret that choice after Lloyd wakes up the evil snake tribe.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in training mode with the looming threat of Lloyd and the Hypnobrai, Zane wanders after a Falcon and lands himself in a heap of trouble. The rest of the Ninja leave the training dojo to help him and return to find that the snakes have burned it …

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd, having been kicked out of the Hynobrai snake tribe unlocks a second tribe – The Fangpyres – to help him regain control.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After the Fangpyres join forces with the Hypnobrai, Lloyd awakens Pythor – the last remaining snake of the Anacondrai tribe.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd moves in and tries to make nice by helping out with chores, but he just gets in the way. Pythor has awoken the Vipoids and the Constrictaurs and an all out snake war has taken over Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Pythor declares himself to be the destined leader who will reawaken The Great Devourer – an ancient beast who can’t be killed and will consume all of Ninjago. We find out Nya is the Samurai and Lloyd is taken prisoner by the snake tribes.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the four ninja follow the mysterious falcon into the woods, they stumble on a hidden work shop where Zane learns the secret about his past and in the process, finally knowing who he is, he is the first ninja to unlock his true potential.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay and Nya have to cut their first date in Mega-Monster Amusement Park short as the Serpentine are on their way to retrieve the first or four fang blades to be used to awaken the Great Devourer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The four ninja go undercover as a dance troupe and enter a talent contest in their quest to win “The Blade Cup” where one of the fang blades is hidden.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninjas are suspicious when their arch enemy Lord Garmadon moves in to help searching for his missing son Lloyd

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja and Sensei Wu try to infiltrate the Serpentines’ inner sanctum and walk right into a trap, and when Lloyd’s rescue mission fails, there is only one person who can help them, namely the evil Lord Garmadon – but can they trust him?

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)

programme.title: Deadly Sins

programme.desc: An egomaniac spins his secrets and lies into a deadly web.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Part 1 of the Season 14 Split Premiere. A new cast of queens, competing for $100,000, must show off their performance skills in a talent show. Superstar singer Lizzo guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Part 2 of the Season 14 Split Premiere. The remaining queens of the brand new cast bring their gifts to a talent show. Singer/ songwriter Alicia Keys guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens put their design skills to the test in a Double Ball challenge, stomping the runway in 42 fashion looks. Christine Chiu (Bling Empire) guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: In their first acting challenge, the queens must create iconic moments for a Drag Race Supertease extended trailer. Comedian and host Loni Love (Soul Plane) guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens must make parody PSAs, for a new charity supporting first-eliminated Drag Race queens. With queens Tempest DuJour, Jaymes Mansfield and Kahmora Hall; pop star Ava Max guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Michelle Visage's online shopping has gotten out of hand. In this design challenge, the queens are tasked to make outfits from all the junk she has ordered. Taraji P. Henson (Empire) guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens don shoulder pads and flex their acting muscles in a campy 80s soap opera. LGBT activist Ts Madison guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens sing and dance in 60s girls groups The Rupremes, The Runettes and The Shangrulas. Comedian Alec Mapa guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: The guest list for Karlie's engagement party ignites a wild confrontation. Mimi squares off with Stevie and demands a sit-down with Faith. Scrapp's reunion with his presumed dead father raises questions. Rasheeda agrees to meet Kirk and Jasmine's son

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Tokyo's weight loss journey takes a hard left turn. Scrapp finds himself caught between the mother of his child and a new flame. Momma Dee accuses Bambi's mother of plotting a coup. Rising rapper Akbar V. takes steps to provide her son a better life.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Tiarra complicates Scrapp's new relationship. Joc's secret girlfriend plots their public debut. Karlie goes behind her fiancé's back. Scrappy tries to mediate Momma Dee's battle with Cece.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Spice makes a bold move that ignites the entire cast. Tokyo struggles with the pressure to lose weight. Jasmine turns the tables on Kirk. Scrappy and Bambi prepare for the birth of their son.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: In the run-up to her engagement party, Karlie's haters plot to expose a long-buried secret. Scrapp gets caught up with his ex. Joc debates coming clean to Kendra. Spice's new look causes an uproar on social media and in real life.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Karlie gets surprising news from her fertility doctor and Arkansas Mo. Moniece confronts Scrapp about his viral video scandal. Erica makes a shocking announcement. Tokyo and Shekinah check Che for her bad behavior. Akbar suffers a traumatic injury.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Secrets and lies come to light at Kirk and Rasheeda's couples retreat. Karlie tangles with a surprise visitor. Fresh bombshells rock Sierra and BK's relationship. Back in the A, Moniece's collab with Akbar goes left.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Tokyo and Akbar clash at their showcase. Karlie goes after Kendra and Bambi as she spirals out of control at the cabin. Erica tries to make peace with Scrappy. Pooh hosts a disastrous cocktail party.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Spice invites Karlie, Joc, and friends to Trinidad. Sierra tries to broker peace between Tokyo and Akbar. Pooh fights to clear her name. Scrapp helps put on a charity benefit. Shekinah handles business for Che.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: The crew arrives in Trinidad. Karlie checks Tokyo and Shekinah. Joc, Kirk, and Scrappy go on a jungle adventure. Pooh airs out Karlie's dirty laundry. Akbar and Scrapp help Che through a personal crisis.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Conflict erupts between Joc and Kendra at an all-night rave in Trinidad. Karlie introduces the crew to her family, and Pooh drops scandalous new receipts. Back in The A, Stevie comes face to face with Scrapp for the first time since he went to prison

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Spice races from Africa to Trinidad for her performance at Machel Monday. Rasheeda blasts Kirk after a shocking discovery. Pooh makes one last attempt to squash the beef with Karlie. Akbar and Sierra's friendship goes all the way left.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Karlie and Mo's issues boil over at a dramatic therapy session. Shekinah uncovers a scandal at Joc's salon. Stevie leads Scrapp and the guys on an outdoor adventure. Rasheeda sets boundaries with Jasmine. Sierra has an angry run-in with BK.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Drama erupts at Kirk and Rasheeda's seminar. Ty questions Mimi's relationship with Stevie. The mothers of Joc's children weigh in on Kendra. Pooh and Akbar link up to take down Shekinah. Scrapp debates his next move with Sierra.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Queen Gretchen of the Kingdom of Monaka dies from a car accident. As a fan of her years as a Hollywood actress, Lupin mourns her passing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Once a year, jewelers from around the country descend on New York City for a jewelry tradeshow, bringing with them their entire inventory. Combined, the jewelry is said to be worth 20 million dollars.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have Pinkerton's unbreakable safe, minus the key. Lupin breaks into the prison where the late Pinkerton was once held and finds the key hidden in his former prison cell. Now the gang has both the safe and key.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: At Fujiko's request, Lupin steals the Hina dolls given to the US Vice President by the Deputy Prime Minister of Japan. However, the doll heist was a trap laid out by Fujiko and her partner, Barracuda.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Goemon pities the young boy who is afflicted with an incurable illness and swears to retrieve his father's painting for him. Will Goemon be able to keep his promise and will Lupin decipher the painting's hidden secret?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The 100-carat blue diamond, known as Hades' Tear is auctioned off at 1 billion dollars along with its accompanying Hades statue to the KL Foundation of Kingsland. Lupin and Jigen make off with Hades' Tear with ease, but they find out it's only glass.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mexico's richest woman, Madame Tequila owns a black diamond named the Black Pig of Mexico. Realizing that Lupin is after her diamond, Madame Tequila appoints Inspector Zenigata to guard it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal the Ivanov, the Soviet Union's newest atomic submarine from the Port of Arkhangelsk. Lupin becomes entangled in a fierce tug of war between the KGB and CIA when Fujiko decides to sell it to the highest bidder.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #9 Islands of Assasins
programme.desc: The den of the deadly Tarantulas gang, this island is the most dangerous place on Earth… and Lupin's right in the middle of it! A dark mystery haunts his past, and the key to it is on the island.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #10 Tokyo Crisis
programme.desc: When Lupin and his bandit buddies attempt to steal a set of historically significant photographic plates, it turns out they're not the only ones with eyes on the prize in this thievish tale of mayhem and millionaires.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #11 The Columbus Files
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko are after the mysterious treasure known only as Columbus' Egg. Fujiko was able to memorize the Egg's location, but when she's attacked and loses her memory, all seems lost. No one else knows where it is. What's a thief to do?

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #12 Missed by a Dollar
programme.desc: At an auction in New York, attendees are shocked when a mysterious man bids $1,000,000 on a plain diamond ring. The man himself is even more astounded when the President of the World Bank outbids him by a single dollar. The man is Lupin!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata arrives in San Marino after receiving a note from Lupin III. Instead of a declaration of a new theft, it's a wedding invitation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Marlow Brozzi, a soccer player from San Marino. A mafia member has proof that Brozzi is cheating so Brozzi approaches Lupin for help.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin and the gang managed to steal a fragment of Marie Antoinette's necklace, but Jigen has been captured by Nyx.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: Los demonios bailan en la villa
programme.desc: Rufas le rompe el corazón a Carolina. A Jey le toca escena de celos doble. La sala tornado sopla todos los chismes de Brandon. El lobo está enjaulado mientras que Yess le hace piojitos. Una fiesta empieza bien y termina con la llegada de un ex.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: Efectos instantáneos
programme.desc: Yess se dio tragos hasta encontrar el más amargo. Los bandos tratan de encontrar la paz, pero solo tratan. Isaac ya no puede forzar la máquina y termina a Leslie. Unas pócimas mágicas llenas de alcohol hacen efecto inmediato en los influencers.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: ¡Que viva la toxicidad!
programme.desc: Lizbeth y Ali dan los votos a su amor tóxico, mientras que los salvados dan sus votos a la soltería. La Love Suite se abre por última vez con un trío muy caliente.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: 10 influencers llegan a sus vacaciones en el caribe, pero la "Tablet del Karma" les recuerda que deben saldar cuentas con sus Ex. Asaf elige a Lilian para su corazon.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Las advertencias de Valentino se convierten en amenazas. A Alex le regalan un shot, pero en la cara. Llega un nuevo Ex y los celos llenan a la villa de problemas.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Valentino celebra el peor cumpleaños por culpa de la Sala Tornado. Desenmascaran a Queen quien saca su furia. Un Ex cae en una venganza tramada. Dos estrenan la Love Suite. Diana y Fershy arruinan la fiesta peleando y alguien debe partir de la villa.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Fershy decide quien se va, entre Beni y Alba. La Sala Tornado cocina una venganza que los hará tambalear a todos. Lilian explora con Alba y Bryan mientras que Asaf aprovecha con Valeria. En la nueva habitacion hay sorpresas inesperadas.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: El nuevo Ex sorprende entrando por la puerta trasera. Asaf arrastra su corazon por culpa de la indiferencia de Lilian, quien prueba los labios de Bryan y Alba. Ana va a la Love Suite y Aldo aprovecha para destrozar las camas. Un Ex llega acompañado.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Ana recibe a su fantasma más toxico y a Fraag lo "ghostean". El sexo de reconciliacion de Asaf y Lilian dura más que su proxima pelea. Valentino y Alex gritan su amor. Valeria se despide de la Villa. Diana y Chava son la pareja del momento.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Diana se asocia con sus dos amores. El deseo de Queen se cumple pero el precio a pagar por el es caro. Una Love Suite causa polemica. Asaf cae en la tentacion y Lilian elije a Bryan para vengarse. La Sala Tornado revela las mentiras de la Villa.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Yasmila y Asaf están en el ojo del huracán. Valeria aprovecha los estragos y se lleva a Aldo. Asaf y Lilian terminan de nuevo. Los sentimientos de Queen hacen que Ana explote y los de Diana hacen que Chava dude. El nuevo Ex llega interrumpiendo.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Llegan nuevos y peligrosos EX. Queen necesita una armadura para tanto golpe al corazon y Fano lucha por mantenerla cerca, mientras que Ana prefiere a Nina. Alex y Kevin se dan latigazos de desprecio en una fiesta en cueros.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: La Bebeshita busca a Queen para hablar, pero tambien para desgreñarla. En un barco pirata, Queen le promete amor a Fano mientras que en la Villa le espera un fantasma del pasado. Dos EX deben regresar al mar por culpa de la Sala Tornado.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Las peleas en la Villa no cesan. Asaf prueba más labios y el corazon de Lilian se parte. Más Ex se van mientras que la ultima en llegar, espera en la Love Suite. La Sala Tornado llama a Brandon y repite la historia, pero ahora con Queen.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.desc: Ben Matlock defends a renowned journalist accused of murdering a beautiful international model. Matlock’s investigation is stalled when he is struck by a car and lands in the hospital with a slight case of amnesia.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers introduces a ventriloquist's dummy he played with as a child. Bob Dog falls and is hurt. They take him to the hospital. King, Friday, prohibits play. Mister Rogers says play is important in learning to manage feelings.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: When King Friday outlaws play, Lady Elaine moves her Museum Go-Round to an entirely new location. She finds herself in a place where play is welcome—a play park, where she meets Barbara Russell.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers uses scissors and talks about safety. Lady Elaine tells Officer Clemmons she won't return to the Neighborhood until King Friday changes his rule against play. Lou Schreiber, Johnny Costa, and Joe Negri play music together.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a cave. Lady Elaine won't return until the no-play rule is changed. King Friday removes the ban when he realizes his fanfare cannot be played.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers walks on stilts and talks about how long it took him to learn to walk on them. Bob Dog persuades Lady Elaine Fairchilde to return to the Neighborhood of Make-Believe. Mister Rogers talks about different ways of playing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how a player piano works. Corney's latest shipment of rocking chairs has been made with half pretzel parts. Mister Rogers talks about how important it is to do things well.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a doll factory. Corney makes King Friday dolls. Lady Elaine is jealous. Mr. McFeely show Mister Rogers a swimming doll. Mister Rogers says he will take us to where he swims.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers goes to visit ice skating star Peggy Fleming, who is practicing for an ice show. They talk about how doing anything well takes a lot of practice.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film about how people make blankets. Lady Elaine convinces Corney to manufacture only rocking chairs. Mister Rogers talks about why children are sometimes punished.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits his friend Adelia Moore to see how she makes stuffed animals for her children. In the Neighborhood of Make- Believe, the Neighbors are making presents for Ana Platypus' birthday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film about how spoons are made. King Friday demands that Lady Aberlin and Robert Troll create a mountain beside the castle. Mary Alice Sherred makes music with spoons.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a juniper tree. Everyone is covering the Eiffel Tower with trees. Queen Sara falls off the tower and is taken to an emergency room. Mister Rogers shows an emergency room.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a small kitten that belongs to Chuck Aber. Mister Rogers shows a film about seat belts. King Friday wants to see a mountain opera.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a popcorn popper. He is introduced to Ray Detwiler who plays rare horns. Chef Brockett gives a popcorn ball to King Friday who declares there be popcorn in the opera.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film about how people make towels. The Neighborhood of Make-Believe is hosting the Make-Believe Olympic Games. Lady Elaine will only agree to play if she is guaranteed to win the games.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with two pieces of wood and turns a chair into a rocking chair. Lady Aberlin and Bob Dog help Corney make rocking chairs. They are unable to stop rocking thanks to Lady Elaine's boomerang.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a robot factory. A robot talks with Lady Elaine but does not understand the term like. Daniel talks to the robot about caring. Handyman Negri tells Daniel that it's great to love others.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Brandon Margulies explains how to play a video game. Keith David shows how the machine works. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, everyone is getting ready for the Olympic games. Lady Elaine has decided to make it snow.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Folk singer Ella Jenkins visits Mister Rogers and sings and plays a song on a harmonica. Mister Rogers has a Neighborhood board game with the different Make-Believe Neighbors.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a daycare and sees children playing. He talks about why children need to go to day care sometimes. King Friday and Queen Sarah have to leave for a few days but Prince Tuesday does not want a babysitter.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando a Tommy le sacan su osito preferido, decide tomar el consejo de Angélica y empieza a portarse mal. / Angélica recibe un juego de magia como regalo. Ella y los Rugrats se sorprenden cuando Angélica hace desaparecer a Lili.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Una nueva familia se muda en frente de la casa de Tommy y él inmediatamente se hace amigo de su nueva vecina de tres años, Susie. / Hugo le compra a Tommy un juego para armar, pero los bebés se entretienen más con la caja del juguete.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de que Angélica les cuenta una historia de terror, Tommy y Carlitos comienzan a tener miedo de irse por el desagüe de la bañera. / Cuando el hermano de Didi se casa, Tommy y Carlitos se obsesionan con el pastel.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy y Carlitos pierden sin querer a Cynthia, la muñeca favorita de Angélica y tienen que decidir si contárselo o no a Angélica. / Carlitos tiene un amigo imaginario que se llama Barney, que nadie puede ver o escuchar, solamente Carlos.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats piensan que un camión de basura que pasa todas las semanas es un monstruo que se llama Hubert. / Los Rugrats ven un programa de televisión sobre un perro que habla, y se convencen de que Firulais los está rechazando.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de una experiencia traumática, Carlitos comienza a temerle a los toboganes. Tommy, Susie, Fili y Lili lo ayudan a superar su miedo. / Los Rugrats van a una piscina pública y la confunden con un inodoro gigante.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Mientras el Abuelo compite en un campeonato de bolos, los Rugrats se van a explorar y descubren que el contrincante del Abuelo está haciendo trampa. / Angélica es castigada por Julio, así que decide dejar su casa e irse a la de Tommy.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Didi concursa en un juego peligroso de televisión en donde tiene que enfrentar sus propios miedos. / Boris y Minka cuidan a Tommy y Angélica por un fin de semana, pero no se acuerdan bien de sus técnicas de cuidar a niños.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando Angélica salva a Carlitos de ser atropellado por un niño en triciclo, ella decide que Carlitos debe ser su esclavo para siempre. / Los bebés admiran a Susie porque ella siempre los defiende de Angélica.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando Angélica se entera del Hada de los Dientes, planea hacerse rica sacándole los dientes a Carlitos y metiéndolos bajo su propia almohada. / La imaginación de los Rugrats se enciende cuando el Abuelo les lee el cuento de Aladino.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando el jefe de Randy es invitado a cenar a la casa, los niños piensan que Susie debe mudarse lejos. Fili y Lili deciden que quieren ser diferentes. Fili trata de ser como Carlitos y Lili trata de ser como Angélica.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: A Carlitos le van a cortar el pelo por primera vez, pero él le tiene miedo a los cortes de cabello, por lo que los Rugrats y Chas deciden ayudarlo a superar su miedo. Angélica y Susie son enviadas al mismo campamento.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando el triciclo de Susie se pierde y Angélica aparece montando uno idéntico, Susie la acusa de ser una ladrona. Angélica juega al doctor y le dice a Carlitos que tiene una enfermedad que lo convertirá en un rinoceronte.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: El Abuelo comienza a sentir que es una molestia y se muda a una casa de retiro que parecía linda por televisión pero termina siendo aburrida. El Abuelo lleva a los Rugrats de campamento en el patio.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de ir al circo, Angélica prepara su propio circo con los Rugrats como los actores. Los Rugrats intentan encontrar un hermanito para Tommy en un huevo abandonado en un nido.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica se pone una crema para la piel que cree que la hace invisible, para tratar de robar postres de la cocina. Después de una mala experiencia, Carlitos decide quedarse adentro de la casa porque Tommy juega muy torpemente.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica es muy mala con los niños, y Tommy desea que algo malo le pase a ella. Angélica se queda en la casa de Tommy cuando sus padres se van de viaje, y hace de cuenta que se le rompió una pierna para que le presten atención.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Mientras están al cuidado de la hermana mayor de Susie, Tommy y su amiga sospechan que hay monstruos dentro de la casa. El Abuelo les cuenta a Angélica y a Tommy de lo mucho que se peleaban Hugo y Julio cuando eran niños.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando la película “Reptar 2010" se rompe, cada Rugrat cuenta su propio final de la historia, describiendo un Reptar que se parece a ellos mismo. Cuando uno de los inventos de Hugo no sale como debía, decide conseguir un trabajo.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de que Carlitos admira uno de los juguetes de Tommy, Tommy decide dárselo, pero luego se arrepiente. Los Rugrats encuentran una moneda en el parque y Angélica hace que los niños traten de encontrar más.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Mientras Hugo muestra unos videos caseros de sus vacaciones, los Rugrats deciden narrar sus propias historias sobre sus vidas. Hugo inventa un muñeco que habla para los niños, pero ellos lo encuentran aterrador.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando Angélica y Carlitos se quedan atados con unas esposas de juguete, tienen que encontrar la forma de separarse. Mientras nieva en el barrio de los Rugrats, los bebés se marchan hacia el patio para buscar el Polo Norte y a Santa.

programme.title: CatDog

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Linlin, destroyed at the disappearance of Mother, falls in with a new cohort and finds a reason to go on living, proving herself a mighty force to be reckoned with! The Straw Hats' plan goes awry, and all hope looks to be lost!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bege and the Straw Hats are on the defensive as the full force of Mom's troops are brought down on them! As they retreat into a fortress, Germa 66 springs in to action! However, Bege has bad news for his allied forces.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats and Germa 66 are cornered in Bege's stronghold - with the full force of the Big Mom Pirates pinning them down, it's only a matter of time before their defenses crack. The only way out seems to be to make a break for it.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The plan is executed to sneak the Straw Hats out of Big Mom's castle while hidden inside Bege! But the irascible Luffy can't resist getting in at least one punch against his foe! Meanwhile, the Tamate Box slips into the hands of some surprising agent!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The full might of the Big Mom Pirates proves too much for the Straw Hats and Germa 66. With no other options, they decide to turn and fight, even though it means their total annihilation!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Whole Cake Chateau starts crumbling while everyone is trying to escape for their lives! Luffy and the others get away and move on to the next stage of their escape, which involves some parting of ways.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats continue their mad dash to the Sunny! As Big Mom rages, her underlings decide to turn her Hunger Pang attacks against the Straw Hats! The Whole Cake Island scrambles to remake the cake to calm down Big Mom!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kingbaum puts his life on the line ferrying the Straw Hats towards the Seducing Woods! But Big Mom's word trumps him in this terrifying forest, and soon enough she catches up! Meanwhile, Pudding puts her plan to rebuild the cake into action!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zeus pursues the Straw Hats as Nami keeps him occupied. She has a shocking surprise in store for him, however, that might stop Big Mom in her tracks! Meanwhile, Brook and Chopper find the Shark Submerge in a strange situation.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Big Mom is relentless in her pursuit of the Straw Hats! Even being buried alive doesn't stop her! The plan to recreate the cake to stop her onslaught progresses, and Pudding's changeable heart confuses all those looking on!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Mama's onslaught continues as Pudding keeps battling the contradictory urges in her head - to kill or kiss Sanji! Meanwhile, Brook and Chopper are at Perospero's mercy - and are being reduced to sweetened versions of themselves!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sandwiched between Big Mom and her advancing fleet, the only hope is the Sunny's Coup-de-Burst! But can the Straw Hats prepare it in time? Meanwhile, Pedro comes face to face with his past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The last chance the Straw Hats have is the Coup de Burst! Pedro has made the ultimate sacrifice to give them this one chance to escape, but Big Mom's naval forces are closing in and poised to knock them out!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami and the others who escaped the Whole Cake Island by Pedro's sacrifice mourn over his death. Jimbei, however, keeps his calm, which makes Brook lose his temper. Meanwhile, Luffy confronts the formidable Sweet General Katakuri in the Mirroworld.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Pudding and Sanji arrive at Cacao Island and begin to remake the only cake that will calm Big Mom! But their fake nuptials get in the way as they bicker like a married couple! Meanwhile, Luffy has lost the battle of his life.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy keeps the forces out to destroy the Straw Hats at bay, however the crew needs to destroy all the mirrors - the final link that secure his safe return - on the ship in order to save themselves!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami and the others start breaking all the mirrors on the Sunny in order to keep their enemies out while she and Luffy discuss where to rendezvous – but little do they know the plan is overheard!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Both powerful combatants and strong users of Haki, Luffy and Katakuri are a dead match for each other. Every move is matched by their opponent! Elsewhere, the Big Mom Pirates square off against Germa!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Katakuri retires to his sanctuary to enjoy the merienda - a chance for him to savor the sweetness of his crew of chefs and replenish his Haki!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy discovers the secret to Katakuri's unearthly fighting ability, and just might have a solution for how to stop him! Meanwhile, at the Sweets Factory, Pudding receives a call from Brulee who has bad news for the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy runs out of his Haki and has to buy some time - in the most peculiar way! Meanwhile the Big Mom Pirates mobilize their entire fleet to squelch the pirate threat, and the replacement cake nears completion!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When Chiffon comes under attack, Sanji must choose between defending her or revealing himself to his enemies! Meanwhile, Luffy uses Brulee as a human shield to avoid the wrath of Big Mom!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bege arrives on the scene, seemingly willing to risk it all to bring down the Big Mom Pirates in a blaze of glory, but of course he has a trick up his sleeve! Meanwhile, Luffy keeps on the move to regain his Haki!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Bege get together and get off of Cacao Island successfully, but their plan is in jeopardy as Oven begins to boil the sea itself! As Chiffon and the others who are on the ship are cornered, a surprising savior comes in to fight Oven!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A vicious pincer attack bears down on the Straw Hats! Three fleets converge and try to squeeze the life from them! Daifuku himself take the lead! But Carrot draws on a deep power within and springs in to action under the light of the moon!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The much anticipated wedding cake is on its way, but there is a debate at the last minute! Shouldn't this opportunity be used to slip poison into Big Mom's meal to topple the Emperor of the Sea?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, through sheer force of will, can almost use his Haki to battle Katakuri! Meanwhile, the Sunny catches fire while the Straw Hats try to kick out Big Mom, but that's when Jimbei steps up to the plate and takes a swing at her!

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: South Jersey Sasquatch

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.desc: When Strawberry gets an urgent plea to return to Oz, she finds that there’s an environmental disaster in the works.

programme.desc: It’s a retelling of 'Sleeping Beauty' – but our focus is on the fairy that didn’t get her invitation and stubbornly refuses to listen to the reason why.

programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake’s childhood friend, Lime Lite, has hit it big in Berrywood, movie capital of Strawberryland.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Prue has a melody in her head and when she sees a girl humming the tune, she finds that it belongs to the ice-cream truck.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: On a field trip everyone notices Tucker bears a striking resemblance to an egyptian pharaoh and after he looks in a ghostly mirror, his minion, Hotep Ra, comes to life.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Vlad forces Danny to get Clockwork's help to travel back in time in order to cure a case of ecto acne that he contracted after a lab accident in college.

programme.title: Danny Phantom

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danny won't admit his jealousy of Sam's new crush, Gregor. Instead he convinces himself that Gregor is an undercover operative for the Guys in White.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danny and Vlad's game of revenge against each other begins with childish pranks, and, unfortunately for Danny, ends when Vlad decides to run for mayor of Amity Park!

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danny helps pull a thorn out of an abominable snowman-like creature, who presides over the chilliest area of the ghost zone.

programme.title: Danny Phantom

programme.title: Danny Phantom

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: There's a new ghost in town. Amorpho, who can become anyone he sees, decides to switch with Danny, but when their powers collide it makes a mess of things!

programme.title: Danny Phantom

programme.title: Danny Phantom

programme.title: Danny Phantom

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: It's a whole new world for Danny Fenton – he's getting A's, he's the quarterback of the football team, he and Tucker are best pals with Dash, and Sam is his girlfriend. What? Turns out it's all a dream!

programme.title: Danny Phantom

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Prince Zuko, a young Firebender whose mission in life is to capture the Avatar, tracks Aang down to the Southern Water Tribe village where Katara and Sokka live.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When locals of a small island discover Aang is the Avatar, they treat him like a celebrity.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.desc: CD goes undercover in a senior nursing home where the elderly are dying at a fast rate. He learns the doctors are testing Alzheimer drugs on the seniors and that they are dying from drug reactions. CD finds himself on the list to be tested.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker is taking some kids on a tour of the Texas Ranger Hall of Fame. When one of them asks him to tell them about a Ranger, Walker chooses to talk about Hayes Cooper.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker continues to tell the story of Hayes Cooper. And he continues when Cooper upon seeing the family he befriended killed, he sets out to go after the ones he believes responsible for their deaths.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A boy with telepathic powers escapes the laboratory where he was living since his mother supposedly died. He learns his mother is alive so he contacts Walker to ask for assistance. The doctors try to destroy evidence and kill witnesses.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Feeling that merely locking up criminals is not making a dent in the crime rate, Walker makes a proposal for new kind reformatory, before Senator Kay Hutchinson.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A horse owner tries to bolster his horses' value by making sure they win all their races. But when another owner puts a crimp on his plans he kills the man and the trainer who was in his pocket.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Thanks to Alex's lawyer father, Alfre is released from prison. She gets a job at a construction site and soon finds the contractor is cutting corners and safety factors. She is in danger before she can report it to Alex and the Rangers.

programme.title: Longmire
programme.desc: Walt wonders if a presumed-dead member of the Irish mob is alive. Meanwhile, Matthias (ZAHN McCLARNON) questions Cady about Catori, and a mobile clinic raises Henry's suspicions.

programme.title: Longmire
programme.desc: While Ferg secretly works the Cowboy Bill case, Walt and Vic try to find Shane Muldoon (recurring guest star DYLAN WALSH). And Cady's office is trashed.

programme.title: Longmire
programme.desc: While an FBI agent helps Walt pin down the mole working with Malachi, Vic gets a surprise visit from her father (JOHN DOMAN). And a tough race enables her to move forward.

programme.title: Longmire
programme.desc: Walt gets an unexpected visitor, while Jacob's troubles escalate at the casino. And an inevitable confrontation leads to changed lives in the series finale.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark and Amanda are assigned to the task force investigating an airplane crash. An adversarial FBI agent and Russian mobsters make their assignment more difficult.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve and Ron lead the chase for the stolen nuclear material.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The Sloans run into plenty of industry politics when they investigate the death of television network executive, Rachel Woodrall. Seamy revelations about Woodrall's college sorority lead to the killer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse finally reunites with his father. After they narrowly elude an assassin, Jesse begins to realize his father isn't the accountant he's always claimed to be, but rather a spy. The Travis's attempt to discover who's sending the killers.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A dead mime leads to an investigation of a crooked auto dealer. Randy Wolfe, a woman who's apparently an expert at everything, leads the investigation while continually annoying Steve.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A motorcycle stunt driver has a fatal accident while filming an action video. Steve investigates.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When Steve is shot and falls into a coma, Mark does all in his power to find the assailant, even threatening a suspect with bodily harm.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: This episode takes place four months after Mark was convicted of murder. Steve is slowly recovering from his wounds and Mark is still rotting in prison.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A hospital emergency preparedness drill turns deadly when an unpopular and ambitious nurse is found dead amid the chaos with an eccentric artist the only witness.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A spat between a girl and her boyfriend leads to an apparent murder, leaving the girl and her mother with a dead body, just as dinner guests Mark and Amanda arrive.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A madman charges into a Lamaze class with a bomb, claiming that a fertility doctor was cheating him. Everything is complicated further when said doctor turns up dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Ratings seeking stunts by TV talk show hosts Darren & Mary have tragic results.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When a rash of deaths at a high school revolves around one 'helpful' young girl, Dr. Sloan risks his own life to uncover the murderer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan investigates to find out who's behind the death of a driver in a speedway crash.

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: Wayne, Paige and Adam are fed up with chauffeuring Bentley. They insist he get his learner’s permit even though he is scared of driving. Emmett attempts to help.

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: When Adam injures himself while sneaking in from a party late at night, Emmett covers for him and has to endure the consequences. Wayne is worried about Adam’s football career and Bentley is jealous of all the attention he’s getting.

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: Derek’s mysterious behavior leads his brothers to surmise he has a girlfriend and are shocked to discover he’s actually in a choir. Much to Derek’s chagrin, Bentley, Paige and Emmett home in on their choir life.

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: Emmett convinces his siblings to create a haunted house. Adam and Emmett procure a very realistic fake cadaver from the teaching hospital, but it turns out the fake cadaver isn’t so fake…

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: The basement hockey tournament is cut short when Wayne enlists the kids to help him finish Paige's anniversary gift, an outdoor she-­shed.

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: Wayne and Paige ban Emmett from playing video games, sending him into a downward spiral. Paige seeks Adam’s help to improve her hand/eye coordination and Wayne reveals a secret about his past.

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: Paige discovers it is no easy task to organize five children on a last-minute trip to Paris. Emmett can’t find his passport, Conner is scared of flying, Bentley and Adam disagree about packing and Derek gets locked in his “safe room”.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Rosario se propone reconquistar a Franco, lo que ella no sabe es que Armando piensa en acabar con él en la fiesta. A las hijas y al padre de Gabriela les extraña su nueva amistad con Dínora.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: En la fiesta, Franco cubre a Sara con piropos y la acompaña al carro, ella ve cuando lo secuestran. Jimena coquetea con un invitado para darle celos a Óscar mientras Norma confronta a su madre.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara arriesga su vida para salvar a Franco de los matones, él le agradece con un beso. Jimena llega a la casa tras burlarse de Óscar y se preocupa por su hermana, a ambas les espera un regaño.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma acude a su cita con Juan, pero se va al ver que no está solo, Óscar enfrenta a Jimena delante de Gabriela, quien se indigna al saber lo sucedido. Franco busca desquitarse de los matones.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora le inventa a Norma que es novia de Juan, él no se queda tranquilo, busca a la madre de su hijo y trata de aclarar todo cuando otra mentira los separa. Franco pone a Armando en su sitio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma cae otra vez en la farsa de Dínora quien se ingenia una insólita historia con Gabriela de cómplice, Martín sospecha de su hija. Jimena regresa con tropiezos a la filmación del comercial.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los matones ponen una bomba en la hacienda Reyes pero se equivocan de carro, Franco descubre que fue un atentado en su contra. Martín aconseja a Sara y confronta a Gabriela y a Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco llega al restaurante y Armando queda impresionado, Reyes culpa a Rosario del atentado por perseguirlo. Martín le dice a Norma que Dínora, Gabriela y Fernando quieren separarla de Juan.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Óscar y Jimena alargan su divorcio, él le pide que ayude a Juan, lo mismo hace Franco con Sara, las dos prometen hablar con Norma. Rosario reconoce que su matrimonio es un fracaso.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando se queja con Gabriela de la paliza que le dieron los Reyes, Sara revela que él la atacó y le dice a Norma que su mamá y Dínora buscan alejarla de Juan. Óscar descubre a Eva.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.
